series_metadata.series_description: Case files serve as primary source of litigation information for a complaint that has been filed against a state agency. It is a recording of all events that have occurred in the case. The case file includes, but is not limited to, the court pleadings, correspondence, discovery, and attorney notes.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: state case has closed and all appeals have exhausted or scanned and saved electronically, whichever occurs earlier. ; Electronic: state case has closed and all appeals have exhausted
